title: tradescantia virginica var. flexuosa
intro: Tradescantia virginica var. flexuosa, also known as the 'Inverted Spurred' or 'Flexuosa' Spiderwort, is a variety of the Tradescantia virginica plant, a flowering perennial native to North America. Tradescantia virginica var. flexuosa has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include treating fever, sore throats, and skin irritations, as well as having antiviral properties that can help combat infections. Tradescantia virginica var. flexuosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized in various ways.
